subject: Galarian Darumaka, a round white snowman-like Pokemon with a small blue face, sitting in a snowy mountainous environment
description: A small, round, white creature with a compact spherical body sits amid a bright snowy landscape with rocky outcroppings. Its face is small and set forward on its round white form. The background shows snow-covered terrain under a pale sky. The overall impression is of a cold-adapted, roly-poly creature at ease in winter conditions. The palette is predominantly white, pale blue, and light grey.
foreground: round white creature on snowy ground
